fields.name: Woodland Flex Boost 1
fields.description: The Woodland Flex Boost 1 combines premium materials with all-day comfort. Engineered for kids shoes enthusiasts who refuse to compromise on style or performance.
fields.features:
Breathable mesh upper
Cushioned midsole for all-day comfort
Durable rubber outsole
Lightweight design
Reinforced heel support
fields.specifications:
Material: Mesh & Synthetic
Sole: Rubber
Closure: Lace-up
Weight: 323g
Care: Wipe with a damp cloth
